markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content marketing, SEO, and outbound campaign progress and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content marketing efforts showing early positive results with impressions increasing from 400 to 1700](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Outbound campaigns launched, including "get koala" campaign, with focus on improving response rates](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Plans to integrate Datagrid product content into articles and leverage existing product videos/transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Strategies discussed to improve email deliverability and diversify domain/email providers](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Agreement to refine industry/use case categorization for both blog content and product interface](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

## Topics

### Content Marketing Progress

  - [41 articles published, 13 more by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Focus on productivity tools, sales/marketing, document handling, data extraction](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Impressions increased from \~400 to \~1700 in recent weeks](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Click-through rate benchmark: 5%+ considered excellent](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Early positive signals on ranking for targeted terms](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

### Outbound Campaigns

  - ["Get koala" campaign launched, targeting website visitors](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Content collaboration campaign: 1 response so far, still iterating](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Pending campaign focused on paid media managers](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Strong open/click rates, but response rates need improvement](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Implementing Gmail to Gmail sending to improve deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### SEO and Link Building

  - [Backlinks being built to Datagrid from various sources](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Focus on holistic SEO approach: backlinks, content, and technical aspects](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Plans to integrate Datagrid with Search Console for deeper insights](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Product Integration in Content

  - [Discussion on incorporating more product-specific content in articles](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Suggestion to use transcripts from product videos for article creation](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Agreement to experiment with 10% of articles having product-specific content initially](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Industry and Use Case Categorization

  - [Plan to categorize content by both industry and use case](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Aim for continuity between blog categories and product interface organization](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Decision to add industry and use case options in the CMS for easy categorization](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### Email Deliverability Challenges

  - [Industry-wide challenges in email deliverability discussed](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Strategies to improve: diversifying domain providers, email providers, and using dedicated IPs](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kaitlin to create an exclusion list of existing customers from HubSpot for outbound campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Thiago to send list of industry/use case options for content categorization](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Vivek to implement changes in CMS for industry/use case categorization](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Team to update CTAs in articles from "book a demo" to "get started" to encourage account creation](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for next Friday at 12 PM Eastern to discuss use cases and integration](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [Jimmy to involve Kyle and Marcel in use case discussions](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Team to continue iterating on outbound campaigns to improve response rates](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Ongoing efforts to improve email deliverability through technical adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/WsYUF5u36dYBfWGGmh8ZKg3-pVQyNmsi?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
